---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<!-- ═══════════════ PROJECT HERO ═══════════════ -->
<div class="project-hero">
 <div class="project-hero-inner">
 <div class="project-badge">Deloitte Capstone, Jan 2026 to May 2026</div>
 <h1>AI-Driven Wildfire Risk Monitoring</h1>
 <p class="project-tagline">Translating satellite data and machine learning into real-time early-warning insights for wildfire response teams.</p>
 <div class="project-meta-chips">
 <span class="chip">Python</span>
 <span class="chip">Machine Learning</span>
 <span class="chip">Geospatial Data</span>
 <span class="chip">Data Visualization</span>
 <span class="chip">Deloitte Partnership</span>
 </div>
 </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ CONTENT ═══════════════ -->
<div class="project-body">

 <!-- Overview -->
 <div class="project-section">
 <div class="project-section-inner">
 <h2 class="section-title">Overview</h2>
 <p>
 As part of the University of Miami MSBA Deloitte DIRPA cohort, our team partnered with Deloitte to design an
 AI-driven solution for wildfire risk monitoring and early detection. Wildfires cause billions in damages annually
 and early-warning capabilities can directly save lives. This project bridges advanced analytics with operational
 decision-making for emergency response stakeholders.
 </p>
 </div>
 </div>

 <!-- Role & Team -->
 <div class="project-section project-section-alt">
 <div class="project-section-inner two-col">
 <div>
 <h2 class="section-title">My Role</h2>
 <p>
 I served as a data analytics and strategy contributor, responsible for translating analytical outputs into
 actionable business insights. My focus spanned data pipeline exploration, stakeholder communication, and
 framing model outputs as decision-ready intelligence.
 </p>
 <ul class="project-list">
 <li>Analyzed environmental and satellite datasets to identify fire-risk indicators</li>
 <li>Developed data visualizations to communicate risk patterns to non-technical stakeholders</li>
 <li>Contributed to the project strategy and client-facing reporting framework</li>
 <li>Collaborated across a cross-functional team with Deloitte advisors</li>
 </ul>
 </div>
 <div>
 <h2 class="section-title">Project Scope</h2>
 <div class="scope-card">
 <div class="scope-item">
 <span class="scope-label">Client</span>
 <span class="scope-value">Deloitte</span>
 </div>
 <div class="scope-item">
 <span class="scope-label">Program</span>
 <span class="scope-value">DIRPA, Deloitte Institute for Research and Practice in Analytics</span>
 </div>
 <div class="scope-item">
 <span class="scope-label">Duration</span>
 <span class="scope-value">January 2026 to May 2026</span>
 </div>
 <div class="scope-item">
 <span class="scope-label">Domain</span>
 <span class="scope-value">Environmental Risk, AI / ML, Public Safety</span>
 </div>
 <div class="scope-item">
 <span class="scope-label">Live Demo</span>
 <span class="scope-value"><a href="https://wildfirewatch-app.streamlit.app/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">wildfirewatch-app.streamlit.app</a></span>
 </div>
 <div class="scope-item">
 <span class="scope-label">Repository</span>
 <span class="scope-value"><a href="https://github.com/nefelizafeiri/wildfirewatch-app" target="_blank" rel="noopener">github.com/nefelizafeiri/wildfirewatch-app</a></span>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>

 <!-- Approach -->
 <div class="project-section">
 <div class="project-section-inner">
 <h2 class="section-title">Approach</h2>
 <div class="approach-steps">
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-num">01</div>
 <div class="step-body">
 <h4>Data Collection and Exploration</h4>
 <p>Gathered and cleaned geospatial, weather, and historical wildfire datasets to build a reliable analytical foundation.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-num">02</div>
 <div class="step-body">
 <h4>Risk Modeling</h4>
 <p>Applied machine learning techniques to identify environmental risk factors and predict high-probability ignition zones.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-num">03</div>
 <div class="step-body">
 <h4>Visualization and Insight Design</h4>
 <p>Designed interactive risk maps and dashboards enabling stakeholders to interpret outputs without specialized data science backgrounds.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 <div class="step">
 <div class="step-num">04</div>
 <div class="step-body">
 <h4>Strategic Recommendations</h4>
 <p>Translated model findings into operational recommendations, aligning analytics outputs with real-world emergency response workflows.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>

 <!-- Key Takeaways -->
 <div class="project-section project-section-alt">
 <div class="project-section-inner">
 <h2 class="section-title">Key Takeaways</h2>
 <div class="takeaway-grid">
 <div class="takeaway-card">
 <div class="takeaway-icon">🔥</div>
 <h4>Real-World Impact</h4>
 <p>Directly applicable to emergency management decision-making at a scale where timing matters most.</p>
 </div>
 <div class="takeaway-card">
 <div class="takeaway-icon">🤝</div>
 <h4>Industry Collaboration</h4>
 <p>Worked alongside Deloitte professionals, gaining hands-on exposure to enterprise-level consulting workflows.</p>
 </div>
 <div class="takeaway-card">
 <div class="takeaway-icon">📊</div>
 <h4>Insight Communication</h4>
 <p>Refined the ability to present complex analytics in a way that drives action across diverse audiences.</p>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>
 </div>

</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ BACK LINK ═══════════════ -->
<div class="back-link-row">
 <a href="index.html" class="back-link">Back to Portfolio</a>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════ FOOTER ═══════════════ -->
<div class="site-footer">
 <p>© 2026 Nefeli Zafeiri,
 <a href="mailto:nefelizafeiri@gmail.com">nefelizafeiri@gmail.com</a>,
 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/nefeli-zafeiri" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
 </p>
</div>
```
